harmonization_steps.title: Step 1: Normalize ClinVar BRCA rows
harmonization_steps.simple: Extract the BRCA windows from the GRCh38 ClinVar VCF, prefix chromosomes with chr, then normalize alleles with bcftools.
harmonization_steps.technical: The normalized rows keep ALLELEID, CLNSIG, CLNREVSTAT, MC-derived effect labels, and raw-record lineage through the OLD_REC tag.

harmonization_steps.title: Step 2: Normalize gnomAD genomes BRCA rows
harmonization_steps.simple: Extract chr13 and chr17 BRCA windows from gnomAD genomes, then normalize biallelic alleles with bcftools.
harmonization_steps.technical: The artifact preserves AC, AN, AF, nhomalt, AFR, and MID metrics per normalized allele.

harmonization_steps.title: Step 3: Normalize gnomAD exomes BRCA rows
harmonization_steps.simple: Extract chr13 and chr17 BRCA windows from gnomAD exomes, then normalize biallelic alleles with bcftools.
harmonization_steps.technical: Exomes stay separate from genomes in the per-source artifact so later combined metrics remain auditable.

harmonization_steps.title: Step 4: Normalize SHGP BRCA rows
harmonization_steps.simple: Filter the Saudi frequency table to BRCA windows, convert rows to minimal VCF, then normalize with bcftools.
harmonization_steps.technical: Each row keeps its original table row locator and the derived SHGP AF still ties back to AC and AN.

harmonization_steps.title: Step 5: Build the Arab pre-GME checkpoint
harmonization_steps.simple: Join the normalized ClinVar, gnomAD, and SHGP artifacts on the canonical variant key.
harmonization_steps.technical: The required publication-facing header stays first and every combined gnomAD metric is derived from explicit per-cohort counts.

final_steps.title: Step 6: Normalize GME BRCA rows
final_steps.simple: Filter GME to BRCA windows, convert summary rows into minimal VCF, then normalize with bcftools.
final_steps.technical: Deletion rows that use '-' are anchored on the previous GRCh38 base so the VCF representation remains valid and explicit.

final_steps.title: Step 7: Build the final Arab checkpoint
final_steps.simple: Add the supporting GME layer on top of the Arab pre-GME checkpoint without changing the required header order.
final_steps.technical: The final table keeps the full legacy extra surface, then adds SHGP audit fields and GME fields; context-only GME subgroup columns remain marked as context extras.

legacy_final_steps.title: Step 4: Build the pre-GME unified checkpoint
legacy_final_steps.simple: The required publication-facing header is materialized before any GME addition.
legacy_final_steps.technical: This table is the supervisor review checkpoint and the source for the Excel export.

legacy_final_steps.title: Step 5: Extract BRCA GME rows directly from raw
legacy_final_steps.simple: GME enters only after the minimum header table already exists and has been reviewed.
legacy_final_steps.technical: GME remains a summary-frequency source, so it adds Arab-specific frequency extras rather than ClinVar-style labels.

legacy_final_steps.title: Step 6: Build the final unified checkpoint
legacy_final_steps.simple: The final checkpoint keeps the required header first and adds GME extras after it.
legacy_final_steps.technical: Obsolete h_* and staging-derived harmonized outputs are removed from arab_acmg_harmonized after this build succeeds.

arab_extension_steps.title: Step 6: Normalize GME BRCA rows
arab_extension_steps.simple: Filter GME to BRCA windows, convert summary rows into minimal VCF, then normalize with bcftools.
arab_extension_steps.technical: Deletion rows that use '-' are anchored on the previous GRCh38 base so the VCF representation remains valid and explicit.

arab_extension_steps.title: Step 7: Build the final Arab checkpoint
arab_extension_steps.simple: Add the supporting GME layer on top of the Arab pre-GME checkpoint without changing the required header order.
arab_extension_steps.technical: The final table keeps the full legacy extra surface, then adds SHGP audit fields and GME fields; context-only GME subgroup columns remain marked as context extras.

pre_gme.title: supervisor_variant_registry_brca_pre_gme_v1
pre_gme.scope_note: Historical checkpoint frozen before the Arab extension work began.
accuracy_notes: Fields without a loaded source remain NULL instead of being guessed.
Required columns are shown first; extras are marked separately in the UI and export.
No durable per-source harmonized BRCA tables remain after this checkpoint design is applied.
scientific_notes: BRCA windows still come from the frozen Ensembl-backed seed, but they are now used inside the checkpoint SQL rather than as a durable BigQuery table.
ClinVar and gnomAD are parsed directly from raw INFO payloads so the checkpoint remains traceable to the untouched upstream sources.
The Excel export mirrors this checkpoint schema one-for-one.

pre_gme.build_sql:
CREATE OR REPLACE TABLE `genome-services-platform.arab_acmg_harmonized.supervisor_variant_registry_brca_pre_gme_v1` AS
        WITH
gene_windows AS (
  SELECT 'BRCA1' AS gene_symbol, 'ENSG00000012048' AS ensembl_gene_id, 'chr17' AS chrom38, '17' AS chrom_nochr, 43044295 AS start_pos38, 43170245 AS end_pos38, 'Ensembl Homo sapiens Gene Summary (GRCh38)' AS coordinate_source, 'https://www.ensembl.org/Homo_sapiens/Gene/Summary?g=ENSG00000012048' AS coordinate_source_url, DATE '2026-03-10' AS accessed_at
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'BRCA2' AS gene_symbol, 'ENSG00000139618' AS ensembl_gene_id, 'chr13' AS chrom38, '13' AS chrom_nochr, 32315086 AS start_pos38, 32400268 AS end_pos38, 'Ensembl Homo sapiens Gene Summary (GRCh38)' AS coordinate_source, 'https://www.ensembl.org/Homo_sapiens/Gene/Summary?g=ENSG00000139618' AS coordinate_source_url, DATE '2026-03-10' AS accessed_at
),
clinvar_source_rows AS (
  SELECT
    gene_windows.gene_symbol,
    gene_windows.chrom38 AS chrom,
    raw.pos AS pos,
    raw.ref AS ref,
    alt_value AS alt,
    CONCAT(gene_windows.chrom38, ':', CAST(raw.pos AS STRING), ':', raw.ref, ':', alt_value) AS variant_key,
    REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)ALLELEID=([^;]+)') AS alleleid,
    REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)CLNSIG=([^;]+)') AS clnsig,
    REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)CLNREVSTAT=([^;]+)') AS clnrevstat,
    REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)MC=[^|]+\|([^;]+)') AS effect
  FROM `genome-services-platform.arab_acmg_raw.clinvar_raw_vcf` AS raw
  JOIN gene_windows
    ON CONCAT('chr', REGEXP_REPLACE(raw.chrom, r'^chr', '')) = gene_windows.chrom38
   AND raw.pos BETWEEN gene_windows.start_pos38 AND gene_windows.end_pos38
  CROSS JOIN UNNEST(SPLIT(raw.alt, ',')) AS alt_value WITH OFFSET AS alt_offset
  WHERE raw.alt IS NOT NULL
    AND raw.alt != ''
    AND alt_value IS NOT NULL
    AND alt_value != ''
),
clinvar_agg AS (
  SELECT
    gene_symbol,
    variant_key,
    ANY_VALUE(chrom) AS chrom,
    ANY_VALUE(pos) AS pos,
    ANY_VALUE(ref) AS ref,
    ANY_VALUE(alt) AS alt,
    STRING_AGG(DISTINCT alleleid, ' | ' ORDER BY alleleid) AS alleleid,
    STRING_AGG(DISTINCT clnsig, ' | ' ORDER BY clnsig) AS clnsig,
    STRING_AGG(DISTINCT clnrevstat, ' | ' ORDER BY clnrevstat) AS clnrevstat,
    STRING_AGG(DISTINCT effect, ' | ' ORDER BY effect) AS effect
  FROM clinvar_source_rows
  GROUP BY gene_symbol, variant_key
),
gnomad_genomes_raw AS (
  SELECT * FROM `genome-services-platform.arab_acmg_raw.gnomad_v4_1_genomes_chr13_raw`
  UNION ALL
  SELECT * FROM `genome-services-platform.arab_acmg_raw.gnomad_v4_1_genomes_chr17_raw`
),
gnomad_genomes_agg_source_rows AS (
  SELECT
    gene_windows.gene_symbol,
    gene_windows.chrom38 AS chrom,
    raw.pos AS pos,
    raw.ref AS ref,
    alt_value AS alt,
    CONCAT(gene_windows.chrom38, ':', CAST(raw.pos AS STRING), ':', raw.ref, ':', alt_value) AS variant_key,
    SAFE_CAST(SPLIT(COALESCE(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AC=([^;]+)'), ''), ',')[SAFE_OFFSET(alt_offset)] AS INT64) AS ac,
    SAFE_CAST(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AN=([^;]+)') AS INT64) AS an,
    COALESCE(
      SAFE_CAST(SPLIT(COALESCE(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AF=([^;]+)'), ''), ',')[SAFE_OFFSET(alt_offset)] AS FLOAT64),
      SAFE_DIVIDE(SAFE_CAST(SPLIT(COALESCE(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AC=([^;]+)'), ''), ',')[SAFE_OFFSET(alt_offset)] AS INT64), NULLIF(SAFE_CAST(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AN=([^;]+)') AS INT64), 0))
    ) AS af,
    SAFE_CAST(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)nhomalt=([^;]+)') AS INT64) AS hom,
    SAFE_CAST(SPLIT(COALESCE(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AC_mid=([^;]+)'), ''), ',')[SAFE_OFFSET(alt_offset)] AS INT64) AS ac_mid,
    SAFE_CAST(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AN_mid=([^;]+)') AS INT64) AS an_mid,
    COALESCE(
      SAFE_CAST(SPLIT(COALESCE(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AF_mid=([^;]+)'), ''), ',')[SAFE_OFFSET(alt_offset)] AS FLOAT64),
      SAFE_DIVIDE(SAFE_CAST(SPLIT(COALESCE(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AC_mid=([^;]+)'), ''), ',')[SAFE_OFFSET(alt_offset)] AS INT64), NULLIF(SAFE_CAST(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AN_mid=([^;]+)') AS INT64), 0))
    ) AS af_mid,
    SAFE_CAST(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)nhomalt_mid=([^;]+)') AS INT64) AS hom_mid,
    SAFE_CAST(SPLIT(COALESCE(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AC_afr=([^;]+)'), ''), ',')[SAFE_OFFSET(alt_offset)] AS INT64) AS ac_afr,
    SAFE_CAST(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AN_afr=([^;]+)') AS INT64) AS an_afr,
    COALESCE(
      SAFE_CAST(SPLIT(COALESCE(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AF_afr=([^;]+)'), ''), ',')[SAFE_OFFSET(alt_offset)] AS FLOAT64),
      SAFE_DIVIDE(SAFE_CAST(SPLIT(COALESCE(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AC_afr=([^;]+)'), ''), ',')[SAFE_OFFSET(alt_offset)] AS INT64), NULLIF(SAFE_CAST(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AN_afr=([^;]+)') AS INT64), 0))
    ) AS af_afr,
    SAFE_CAST(SPLIT(COALESCE(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AC_nfe=([^;]+)'), ''), ',')[SAFE_OFFSET(alt_offset)] AS INT64) AS ac_nfe,
    SAFE_CAST(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AN_nfe=([^;]+)') AS INT64) AS an_nfe,
    SAFE_CAST(SPLIT(COALESCE(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AF_nfe=([^;]+)'), ''), ',')[SAFE_OFFSET(alt_offset)] AS FLOAT64) AS af_nfe,
    SAFE_CAST(SPLIT(COALESCE(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AC_fin=([^;]+)'), ''), ',')[SAFE_OFFSET(alt_offset)] AS INT64) AS ac_fin,
    SAFE_CAST(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AN_fin=([^;]+)') AS INT64) AS an_fin,
    SAFE_CAST(SPLIT(COALESCE(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AF_fin=([^;]+)'), ''), ',')[SAFE_OFFSET(alt_offset)] AS FLOAT64) AS af_fin,
    SAFE_CAST(SPLIT(COALESCE(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AC_asj=([^;]+)'), ''), ',')[SAFE_OFFSET(alt_offset)] AS INT64) AS ac_asj,
    SAFE_CAST(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AN_asj=([^;]+)') AS INT64) AS an_asj,
    SAFE_CAST(SPLIT(COALESCE(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AF_asj=([^;]+)'), ''), ',')[SAFE_OFFSET(alt_offset)] AS FLOAT64) AS af_asj,
    SAFE_CAST(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)faf95=([^;]+)') AS FLOAT64) AS grpmax_faf95,
    SAFE_CAST(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)VarDP=([^;]+)') AS FLOAT64) AS depth
  FROM gnomad_genomes_raw AS raw
  JOIN gene_windows
    ON CONCAT('chr', REGEXP_REPLACE(raw.chrom, r'^chr', '')) = gene_windows.chrom38
   AND raw.pos BETWEEN gene_windows.start_pos38 AND gene_windows.end_pos38
  CROSS JOIN UNNEST(SPLIT(raw.alt, ',')) AS alt_value WITH OFFSET AS alt_offset
  WHERE raw.alt IS NOT NULL
    AND raw.alt != ''
    AND alt_value IS NOT NULL
    AND alt_value != ''
),
gnomad_genomes_agg AS (
  SELECT
    gene_symbol,
    variant_key,
    ANY_VALUE(chrom) AS chrom,
    ANY_VALUE(pos) AS pos,
    ANY_VALUE(ref) AS ref,
    ANY_VALUE(alt) AS alt,
    SUM(ac) AS ac,
    SUM(an) AS an,
    SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(ac), NULLIF(SUM(an), 0)) AS af,
    SUM(hom) AS hom,
    SUM(ac_mid) AS ac_mid,
    SUM(an_mid) AS an_mid,
    SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(ac_mid), NULLIF(SUM(an_mid), 0)) AS af_mid,
    SUM(hom_mid) AS hom_mid,
    SUM(ac_afr) AS ac_afr,
    SUM(an_afr) AS an_afr,
    SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(ac_afr), NULLIF(SUM(an_afr), 0)) AS af_afr,
    SUM(COALESCE(ac_nfe, 0) + COALESCE(ac_fin, 0) + COALESCE(ac_asj, 0)) AS ac_eur_proxy,
    SUM(COALESCE(an_nfe, 0) + COALESCE(an_fin, 0) + COALESCE(an_asj, 0)) AS an_eur_proxy,
    SAFE_DIVIDE(
      SUM(COALESCE(ac_nfe, 0) + COALESCE(ac_fin, 0) + COALESCE(ac_asj, 0)),
      NULLIF(SUM(COALESCE(an_nfe, 0) + COALESCE(an_fin, 0) + COALESCE(an_asj, 0)), 0)
    ) AS af_eur_proxy,
    MAX(grpmax_faf95) AS grpmax_faf95,
    MAX(depth) AS depth
  FROM gnomad_genomes_agg_source_rows
  GROUP BY gene_symbol, variant_key
),
gnomad_exomes_raw AS (
  SELECT * FROM `genome-services-platform.arab_acmg_raw.gnomad_v4_1_exomes_chr13_raw`
  UNION ALL
  SELECT * FROM `genome-services-platform.arab_acmg_raw.gnomad_v4_1_exomes_chr17_raw`
),
gnomad_exomes_agg_source_rows AS (
  SELECT
    gene_windows.gene_symbol,
    gene_windows.chrom38 AS chrom,
    raw.pos AS pos,
    raw.ref AS ref,
    alt_value AS alt,
    CONCAT(gene_windows.chrom38, ':', CAST(raw.pos AS STRING), ':', raw.ref, ':', alt_value) AS variant_key,
    SAFE_CAST(SPLIT(COALESCE(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AC=([^;]+)'), ''), ',')[SAFE_OFFSET(alt_offset)] AS INT64) AS ac,
    SAFE_CAST(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AN=([^;]+)') AS INT64) AS an,
    COALESCE(
      SAFE_CAST(SPLIT(COALESCE(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AF=([^;]+)'), ''), ',')[SAFE_OFFSET(alt_offset)] AS FLOAT64),
      SAFE_DIVIDE(SAFE_CAST(SPLIT(COALESCE(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AC=([^;]+)'), ''), ',')[SAFE_OFFSET(alt_offset)] AS INT64), NULLIF(SAFE_CAST(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AN=([^;]+)') AS INT64), 0))
    ) AS af,
    SAFE_CAST(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)nhomalt=([^;]+)') AS INT64) AS hom,
    SAFE_CAST(SPLIT(COALESCE(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AC_mid=([^;]+)'), ''), ',')[SAFE_OFFSET(alt_offset)] AS INT64) AS ac_mid,
    SAFE_CAST(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AN_mid=([^;]+)') AS INT64) AS an_mid,
    COALESCE(
      SAFE_CAST(SPLIT(COALESCE(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AF_mid=([^;]+)'), ''), ',')[SAFE_OFFSET(alt_offset)] AS FLOAT64),
      SAFE_DIVIDE(SAFE_CAST(SPLIT(COALESCE(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AC_mid=([^;]+)'), ''), ',')[SAFE_OFFSET(alt_offset)] AS INT64), NULLIF(SAFE_CAST(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AN_mid=([^;]+)') AS INT64), 0))
    ) AS af_mid,
    SAFE_CAST(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)nhomalt_mid=([^;]+)') AS INT64) AS hom_mid,
    SAFE_CAST(SPLIT(COALESCE(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AC_afr=([^;]+)'), ''), ',')[SAFE_OFFSET(alt_offset)] AS INT64) AS ac_afr,
    SAFE_CAST(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AN_afr=([^;]+)') AS INT64) AS an_afr,
    COALESCE(
      SAFE_CAST(SPLIT(COALESCE(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AF_afr=([^;]+)'), ''), ',')[SAFE_OFFSET(alt_offset)] AS FLOAT64),
      SAFE_DIVIDE(SAFE_CAST(SPLIT(COALESCE(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AC_afr=([^;]+)'), ''), ',')[SAFE_OFFSET(alt_offset)] AS INT64), NULLIF(SAFE_CAST(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AN_afr=([^;]+)') AS INT64), 0))
    ) AS af_afr,
    SAFE_CAST(SPLIT(COALESCE(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AC_nfe=([^;]+)'), ''), ',')[SAFE_OFFSET(alt_offset)] AS INT64) AS ac_nfe,
    SAFE_CAST(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AN_nfe=([^;]+)') AS INT64) AS an_nfe,
    SAFE_CAST(SPLIT(COALESCE(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AF_nfe=([^;]+)'), ''), ',')[SAFE_OFFSET(alt_offset)] AS FLOAT64) AS af_nfe,
    SAFE_CAST(SPLIT(COALESCE(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AC_fin=([^;]+)'), ''), ',')[SAFE_OFFSET(alt_offset)] AS INT64) AS ac_fin,
    SAFE_CAST(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AN_fin=([^;]+)') AS INT64) AS an_fin,
    SAFE_CAST(SPLIT(COALESCE(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AF_fin=([^;]+)'), ''), ',')[SAFE_OFFSET(alt_offset)] AS FLOAT64) AS af_fin,
    SAFE_CAST(SPLIT(COALESCE(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AC_asj=([^;]+)'), ''), ',')[SAFE_OFFSET(alt_offset)] AS INT64) AS ac_asj,
    SAFE_CAST(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AN_asj=([^;]+)') AS INT64) AS an_asj,
    SAFE_CAST(SPLIT(COALESCE(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AF_asj=([^;]+)'), ''), ',')[SAFE_OFFSET(alt_offset)] AS FLOAT64) AS af_asj,
    SAFE_CAST(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)faf95=([^;]+)') AS FLOAT64) AS grpmax_faf95,
    SAFE_CAST(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)VarDP=([^;]+)') AS FLOAT64) AS depth
  FROM gnomad_exomes_raw AS raw
  JOIN gene_windows
    ON CONCAT('chr', REGEXP_REPLACE(raw.chrom, r'^chr', '')) = gene_windows.chrom38
   AND raw.pos BETWEEN gene_windows.start_pos38 AND gene_windows.end_pos38
  CROSS JOIN UNNEST(SPLIT(raw.alt, ',')) AS alt_value WITH OFFSET AS alt_offset
  WHERE raw.alt IS NOT NULL
    AND raw.alt != ''
    AND alt_value IS NOT NULL
    AND alt_value != ''
),
gnomad_exomes_agg AS (
  SELECT
    gene_symbol,
    variant_key,
    ANY_VALUE(chrom) AS chrom,
    ANY_VALUE(pos) AS pos,
    ANY_VALUE(ref) AS ref,
    ANY_VALUE(alt) AS alt,
    SUM(ac) AS ac,
    SUM(an) AS an,
    SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(ac), NULLIF(SUM(an), 0)) AS af,
    SUM(hom) AS hom,
    SUM(ac_mid) AS ac_mid,
    SUM(an_mid) AS an_mid,
    SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(ac_mid), NULLIF(SUM(an_mid), 0)) AS af_mid,
    SUM(hom_mid) AS hom_mid,
    SUM(ac_afr) AS ac_afr,
    SUM(an_afr) AS an_afr,
    SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(ac_afr), NULLIF(SUM(an_afr), 0)) AS af_afr,
    SUM(COALESCE(ac_nfe, 0) + COALESCE(ac_fin, 0) + COALESCE(ac_asj, 0)) AS ac_eur_proxy,
    SUM(COALESCE(an_nfe, 0) + COALESCE(an_fin, 0) + COALESCE(an_asj, 0)) AS an_eur_proxy,
    SAFE_DIVIDE(
      SUM(COALESCE(ac_nfe, 0) + COALESCE(ac_fin, 0) + COALESCE(ac_asj, 0)),
      NULLIF(SUM(COALESCE(an_nfe, 0) + COALESCE(an_fin, 0) + COALESCE(an_asj, 0)), 0)
    ) AS af_eur_proxy,
    MAX(grpmax_faf95) AS grpmax_faf95,
    MAX(depth) AS depth
  FROM gnomad_exomes_agg_source_rows
  GROUP BY gene_symbol, variant_key
),
all_keys AS (
  SELECT gene_symbol, variant_key, chrom, pos, ref, alt FROM clinvar_agg
  UNION DISTINCT
  SELECT gene_symbol, variant_key, chrom, pos, ref, alt FROM gnomad_genomes_agg
  UNION DISTINCT
  SELECT gene_symbol, variant_key, chrom, pos, ref, alt FROM gnomad_exomes_agg
)
        SELECT
  all_keys.chrom AS `CHROM`,
  all_keys.pos AS `POS`,
  all_keys.pos + LENGTH(all_keys.ref) - 1 AS `END`,
  all_keys.variant_key AS `ID`,
  all_keys.ref AS `REF`,
  all_keys.alt AS `ALT`,
  CASE
  WHEN LENGTH(all_keys.ref) = 1 AND LENGTH(all_keys.alt) = 1 THEN 'SNV'
  WHEN LENGTH(all_keys.ref) = LENGTH(all_keys.alt) AND LENGTH(all_keys.ref) > 1 THEN 'MNV'
  WHEN LENGTH(all_keys.ref) < LENGTH(all_keys.alt) THEN 'INS'
  WHEN LENGTH(all_keys.ref) > LENGTH(all_keys.alt) THEN 'DEL'
  ELSE 'COMPLEX'
END AS `VARTYPE`,
  CAST(NULL AS STRING) AS `Repeat`,
  CAST(NULL AS STRING) AS `Segdup`,
  CAST(NULL AS STRING) AS `Blacklist`,
  all_keys.gene_symbol AS `GENE`,
  clinvar.effect AS `EFFECT`,
  CAST(NULL AS STRING) AS `HGVS_C`,
  CAST(NULL AS STRING) AS `HGVS_P`,
  CAST(NULL AS STRING) AS `PHENOTYPES_OMIM`,
  CAST(NULL AS STRING) AS `PHENOTYPES_OMIM_ID`,
  CAST(NULL AS STRING) AS `INHERITANCE_PATTERN`,
  clinvar.alleleid AS `ALLELEID`,
  clinvar.clnsig AS `CLNSIG`,
  CAST(NULL AS FLOAT64) AS `TOPMED_AF`,
  CAST(NULL AS INT64) AS `TOPMed_Hom`,
  CAST(NULL AS FLOAT64) AS `ALFA_AF`,
  CAST(NULL AS INT64) AS `ALFA_Hom`,
  SAFE_DIVIDE(COALESCE(gnomad_genomes.ac, 0) + COALESCE(gnomad_exomes.ac, 0), NULLIF(COALESCE(gnomad_genomes.an, 0) + COALESCE(gnomad_exomes.an, 0), 0)) AS `GNOMAD_ALL_AF`,
  CASE
    WHEN gnomad_genomes.hom IS NULL AND gnomad_exomes.hom IS NULL THEN NULL
    ELSE COALESCE(gnomad_genomes.hom, 0) + COALESCE(gnomad_exomes.hom, 0)
  END AS `gnomAD_all_Hom`,
  SAFE_DIVIDE(COALESCE(gnomad_genomes.ac_mid, 0) + COALESCE(gnomad_exomes.ac_mid, 0), NULLIF(COALESCE(gnomad_genomes.an_mid, 0) + COALESCE(gnomad_exomes.an_mid, 0), 0)) AS `GNOMAD_MID_AF`,
  CASE
    WHEN gnomad_genomes.hom_mid IS NULL AND gnomad_exomes.hom_mid IS NULL THEN NULL
    ELSE COALESCE(gnomad_genomes.hom_mid, 0) + COALESCE(gnomad_exomes.hom_mid, 0)
  END AS `gnomAD_mid_Hom`,
  CAST(NULL AS FLOAT64) AS `ONEKGP_AF`,
  CAST(NULL AS FLOAT64) AS `REGENERON_AF`,
  CAST(NULL AS FLOAT64) AS `TGP_AF`,
  CAST(NULL AS FLOAT64) AS `QATARI`,
  CAST(NULL AS FLOAT64) AS `JGP_AF`,
  CAST(NULL AS FLOAT64) AS `JGP_MAF`,
  CAST(NULL AS INT64) AS `JGP_Hom`,
  CAST(NULL AS INT64) AS `JGP_Het`,
  CAST(NULL AS INT64) AS `JGP_AC_Hemi`,
  CAST(NULL AS STRING) AS `SIFT_PRED`,
  CAST(NULL AS STRING) AS `POLYPHEN2_HDIV_PRED`,
  CAST(NULL AS STRING) AS `POLYPHEN2_HVAR_PRED`,
  CAST(NULL AS STRING) AS `PROVEAN_PRE`,
  clinvar.clnrevstat AS `CLNREVSTAT`,
  gnomad_genomes.ac AS `GNOMAD_GENOMES_AC`,
  gnomad_genomes.an AS `GNOMAD_GENOMES_AN`,
  gnomad_genomes.af AS `GNOMAD_GENOMES_AF`,
  gnomad_genomes.hom AS `GNOMAD_GENOMES_HOM`,
  gnomad_genomes.af_afr AS `GNOMAD_GENOMES_AF_AFR`,
  gnomad_genomes.af_eur_proxy AS `GNOMAD_GENOMES_AF_EUR_PROXY`,
  gnomad_exomes.ac AS `GNOMAD_EXOMES_AC`,
  gnomad_exomes.an AS `GNOMAD_EXOMES_AN`,
  gnomad_exomes.af AS `GNOMAD_EXOMES_AF`,
  gnomad_exomes.hom AS `GNOMAD_EXOMES_HOM`,
  gnomad_exomes.af_afr AS `GNOMAD_EXOMES_AF_AFR`,
  gnomad_exomes.af_eur_proxy AS `GNOMAD_EXOMES_AF_EUR_PROXY`,
  gnomad_genomes.depth AS `GNOMAD_GENOMES_DEPTH`,
  gnomad_exomes.depth AS `GNOMAD_EXOMES_DEPTH`,
  IF(clinvar.variant_key IS NOT NULL, 1, 0)
    + IF(gnomad_genomes.variant_key IS NOT NULL, 1, 0)
    + IF(gnomad_exomes.variant_key IS NOT NULL, 1, 0) AS `SOURCE_COUNT`,
  'PRE_GME_REVIEW' AS `PIPELINE_STAGE`
FROM all_keys
LEFT JOIN clinvar_agg AS clinvar USING (gene_symbol, variant_key)
LEFT JOIN gnomad_genomes_agg AS gnomad_genomes USING (gene_symbol, variant_key)
LEFT JOIN gnomad_exomes_agg AS gnomad_exomes USING (gene_symbol, variant_key)
        ORDER BY `GENE`, `CHROM`, `POS`, `REF`, `ALT`

SELECT *
FROM (
  SELECT
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY `GENE`, `CHROM`, `POS`, `REF`, `ALT`) AS sample_row_number,

  FROM `genome-services-platform.arab_acmg_harmonized.supervisor_variant_registry_brca_pre_gme_v1`

)
WHERE sample_row_number <= 10
ORDER BY sample_row_number

registry.scope_note: Historical final BRCA checkpoint frozen before adding the new Arab frequency datasets.
accuracy_notes: The first columns stay aligned to the requested publication-facing header.
GME is added only after the pre-GME checkpoint exists and can be reviewed independently.
Extra columns remain visually distinguished from the required floor.
scientific_notes: GNOMAD_ALL_AF and GNOMAD_MID_AF are derived from the currently loaded genomes + exomes cohorts, not from a hidden external merged table.
Fields such as TOPMED, ALFA, OMIM, JGP, and in-silico predictors remain NULL until those sources are added explicitly.
The final checkpoint is the only durable harmonized output after GME integration.

registry.build_sql:
CREATE OR REPLACE TABLE `genome-services-platform.arab_acmg_harmonized.supervisor_variant_registry_brca_v1` AS
        WITH
gene_windows AS (
  SELECT 'BRCA1' AS gene_symbol, 'ENSG00000012048' AS ensembl_gene_id, 'chr17' AS chrom38, '17' AS chrom_nochr, 43044295 AS start_pos38, 43170245 AS end_pos38, 'Ensembl Homo sapiens Gene Summary (GRCh38)' AS coordinate_source, 'https://www.ensembl.org/Homo_sapiens/Gene/Summary?g=ENSG00000012048' AS coordinate_source_url, DATE '2026-03-10' AS accessed_at
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'BRCA2' AS gene_symbol, 'ENSG00000139618' AS ensembl_gene_id, 'chr13' AS chrom38, '13' AS chrom_nochr, 32315086 AS start_pos38, 32400268 AS end_pos38, 'Ensembl Homo sapiens Gene Summary (GRCh38)' AS coordinate_source, 'https://www.ensembl.org/Homo_sapiens/Gene/Summary?g=ENSG00000139618' AS coordinate_source_url, DATE '2026-03-10' AS accessed_at
),
clinvar_source_rows AS (
  SELECT
    gene_windows.gene_symbol,
    gene_windows.chrom38 AS chrom,
    raw.pos AS pos,
    raw.ref AS ref,
    alt_value AS alt,
    CONCAT(gene_windows.chrom38, ':', CAST(raw.pos AS STRING), ':', raw.ref, ':', alt_value) AS variant_key,
    REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)ALLELEID=([^;]+)') AS alleleid,
    REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)CLNSIG=([^;]+)') AS clnsig,
    REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)CLNREVSTAT=([^;]+)') AS clnrevstat,
    REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)MC=[^|]+\|([^;]+)') AS effect
  FROM `genome-services-platform.arab_acmg_raw.clinvar_raw_vcf` AS raw
  JOIN gene_windows
    ON CONCAT('chr', REGEXP_REPLACE(raw.chrom, r'^chr', '')) = gene_windows.chrom38
   AND raw.pos BETWEEN gene_windows.start_pos38 AND gene_windows.end_pos38
  CROSS JOIN UNNEST(SPLIT(raw.alt, ',')) AS alt_value WITH OFFSET AS alt_offset
  WHERE raw.alt IS NOT NULL
    AND raw.alt != ''
    AND alt_value IS NOT NULL
    AND alt_value != ''
),
clinvar_agg AS (
  SELECT
    gene_symbol,
    variant_key,
    ANY_VALUE(chrom) AS chrom,
    ANY_VALUE(pos) AS pos,
    ANY_VALUE(ref) AS ref,
    ANY_VALUE(alt) AS alt,
    STRING_AGG(DISTINCT alleleid, ' | ' ORDER BY alleleid) AS alleleid,
    STRING_AGG(DISTINCT clnsig, ' | ' ORDER BY clnsig) AS clnsig,
    STRING_AGG(DISTINCT clnrevstat, ' | ' ORDER BY clnrevstat) AS clnrevstat,
    STRING_AGG(DISTINCT effect, ' | ' ORDER BY effect) AS effect
  FROM clinvar_source_rows
  GROUP BY gene_symbol, variant_key
),
gnomad_genomes_raw AS (
  SELECT * FROM `genome-services-platform.arab_acmg_raw.gnomad_v4_1_genomes_chr13_raw`
  UNION ALL
  SELECT * FROM `genome-services-platform.arab_acmg_raw.gnomad_v4_1_genomes_chr17_raw`
),
gnomad_genomes_agg_source_rows AS (
  SELECT
    gene_windows.gene_symbol,
    gene_windows.chrom38 AS chrom,
    raw.pos AS pos,
    raw.ref AS ref,
    alt_value AS alt,
    CONCAT(gene_windows.chrom38, ':', CAST(raw.pos AS STRING), ':', raw.ref, ':', alt_value) AS variant_key,
    SAFE_CAST(SPLIT(COALESCE(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AC=([^;]+)'), ''), ',')[SAFE_OFFSET(alt_offset)] AS INT64) AS ac,
    SAFE_CAST(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AN=([^;]+)') AS INT64) AS an,
    COALESCE(
      SAFE_CAST(SPLIT(COALESCE(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AF=([^;]+)'), ''), ',')[SAFE_OFFSET(alt_offset)] AS FLOAT64),
      SAFE_DIVIDE(SAFE_CAST(SPLIT(COALESCE(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AC=([^;]+)'), ''), ',')[SAFE_OFFSET(alt_offset)] AS INT64), NULLIF(SAFE_CAST(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AN=([^;]+)') AS INT64), 0))
    ) AS af,
    SAFE_CAST(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)nhomalt=([^;]+)') AS INT64) AS hom,
    SAFE_CAST(SPLIT(COALESCE(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AC_mid=([^;]+)'), ''), ',')[SAFE_OFFSET(alt_offset)] AS INT64) AS ac_mid,
    SAFE_CAST(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AN_mid=([^;]+)') AS INT64) AS an_mid,
    COALESCE(
      SAFE_CAST(SPLIT(COALESCE(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AF_mid=([^;]+)'), ''), ',')[SAFE_OFFSET(alt_offset)] AS FLOAT64),
      SAFE_DIVIDE(SAFE_CAST(SPLIT(COALESCE(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AC_mid=([^;]+)'), ''), ',')[SAFE_OFFSET(alt_offset)] AS INT64), NULLIF(SAFE_CAST(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AN_mid=([^;]+)') AS INT64), 0))
    ) AS af_mid,
    SAFE_CAST(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)nhomalt_mid=([^;]+)') AS INT64) AS hom_mid,
    SAFE_CAST(SPLIT(COALESCE(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AC_afr=([^;]+)'), ''), ',')[SAFE_OFFSET(alt_offset)] AS INT64) AS ac_afr,
    SAFE_CAST(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AN_afr=([^;]+)') AS INT64) AS an_afr,
    COALESCE(
      SAFE_CAST(SPLIT(COALESCE(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AF_afr=([^;]+)'), ''), ',')[SAFE_OFFSET(alt_offset)] AS FLOAT64),
      SAFE_DIVIDE(SAFE_CAST(SPLIT(COALESCE(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AC_afr=([^;]+)'), ''), ',')[SAFE_OFFSET(alt_offset)] AS INT64), NULLIF(SAFE_CAST(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AN_afr=([^;]+)') AS INT64), 0))
    ) AS af_afr,
    SAFE_CAST(SPLIT(COALESCE(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AC_nfe=([^;]+)'), ''), ',')[SAFE_OFFSET(alt_offset)] AS INT64) AS ac_nfe,
    SAFE_CAST(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AN_nfe=([^;]+)') AS INT64) AS an_nfe,
    SAFE_CAST(SPLIT(COALESCE(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AF_nfe=([^;]+)'), ''), ',')[SAFE_OFFSET(alt_offset)] AS FLOAT64) AS af_nfe,
    SAFE_CAST(SPLIT(COALESCE(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AC_fin=([^;]+)'), ''), ',')[SAFE_OFFSET(alt_offset)] AS INT64) AS ac_fin,
    SAFE_CAST(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AN_fin=([^;]+)') AS INT64) AS an_fin,
    SAFE_CAST(SPLIT(COALESCE(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AF_fin=([^;]+)'), ''), ',')[SAFE_OFFSET(alt_offset)] AS FLOAT64) AS af_fin,
    SAFE_CAST(SPLIT(COALESCE(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AC_asj=([^;]+)'), ''), ',')[SAFE_OFFSET(alt_offset)] AS INT64) AS ac_asj,
    SAFE_CAST(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AN_asj=([^;]+)') AS INT64) AS an_asj,
    SAFE_CAST(SPLIT(COALESCE(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AF_asj=([^;]+)'), ''), ',')[SAFE_OFFSET(alt_offset)] AS FLOAT64) AS af_asj,
    SAFE_CAST(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)faf95=([^;]+)') AS FLOAT64) AS grpmax_faf95,
    SAFE_CAST(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)VarDP=([^;]+)') AS FLOAT64) AS depth
  FROM gnomad_genomes_raw AS raw
  JOIN gene_windows
    ON CONCAT('chr', REGEXP_REPLACE(raw.chrom, r'^chr', '')) = gene_windows.chrom38
   AND raw.pos BETWEEN gene_windows.start_pos38 AND gene_windows.end_pos38
  CROSS JOIN UNNEST(SPLIT(raw.alt, ',')) AS alt_value WITH OFFSET AS alt_offset
  WHERE raw.alt IS NOT NULL
    AND raw.alt != ''
    AND alt_value IS NOT NULL
    AND alt_value != ''
),
gnomad_genomes_agg AS (
  SELECT
    gene_symbol,
    variant_key,
    ANY_VALUE(chrom) AS chrom,
    ANY_VALUE(pos) AS pos,
    ANY_VALUE(ref) AS ref,
    ANY_VALUE(alt) AS alt,
    SUM(ac) AS ac,
    SUM(an) AS an,
    SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(ac), NULLIF(SUM(an), 0)) AS af,
    SUM(hom) AS hom,
    SUM(ac_mid) AS ac_mid,
    SUM(an_mid) AS an_mid,
    SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(ac_mid), NULLIF(SUM(an_mid), 0)) AS af_mid,
    SUM(hom_mid) AS hom_mid,
    SUM(ac_afr) AS ac_afr,
    SUM(an_afr) AS an_afr,
    SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(ac_afr), NULLIF(SUM(an_afr), 0)) AS af_afr,
    SUM(COALESCE(ac_nfe, 0) + COALESCE(ac_fin, 0) + COALESCE(ac_asj, 0)) AS ac_eur_proxy,
    SUM(COALESCE(an_nfe, 0) + COALESCE(an_fin, 0) + COALESCE(an_asj, 0)) AS an_eur_proxy,
    SAFE_DIVIDE(
      SUM(COALESCE(ac_nfe, 0) + COALESCE(ac_fin, 0) + COALESCE(ac_asj, 0)),
      NULLIF(SUM(COALESCE(an_nfe, 0) + COALESCE(an_fin, 0) + COALESCE(an_asj, 0)), 0)
    ) AS af_eur_proxy,
    MAX(grpmax_faf95) AS grpmax_faf95,
    MAX(depth) AS depth
  FROM gnomad_genomes_agg_source_rows
  GROUP BY gene_symbol, variant_key
),
gnomad_exomes_raw AS (
  SELECT * FROM `genome-services-platform.arab_acmg_raw.gnomad_v4_1_exomes_chr13_raw`
  UNION ALL
  SELECT * FROM `genome-services-platform.arab_acmg_raw.gnomad_v4_1_exomes_chr17_raw`
),
gnomad_exomes_agg_source_rows AS (
  SELECT
    gene_windows.gene_symbol,
    gene_windows.chrom38 AS chrom,
    raw.pos AS pos,
    raw.ref AS ref,
    alt_value AS alt,
    CONCAT(gene_windows.chrom38, ':', CAST(raw.pos AS STRING), ':', raw.ref, ':', alt_value) AS variant_key,
    SAFE_CAST(SPLIT(COALESCE(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AC=([^;]+)'), ''), ',')[SAFE_OFFSET(alt_offset)] AS INT64) AS ac,
    SAFE_CAST(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AN=([^;]+)') AS INT64) AS an,
    COALESCE(
      SAFE_CAST(SPLIT(COALESCE(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AF=([^;]+)'), ''), ',')[SAFE_OFFSET(alt_offset)] AS FLOAT64),
      SAFE_DIVIDE(SAFE_CAST(SPLIT(COALESCE(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AC=([^;]+)'), ''), ',')[SAFE_OFFSET(alt_offset)] AS INT64), NULLIF(SAFE_CAST(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AN=([^;]+)') AS INT64), 0))
    ) AS af,
    SAFE_CAST(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)nhomalt=([^;]+)') AS INT64) AS hom,
    SAFE_CAST(SPLIT(COALESCE(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AC_mid=([^;]+)'), ''), ',')[SAFE_OFFSET(alt_offset)] AS INT64) AS ac_mid,
    SAFE_CAST(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AN_mid=([^;]+)') AS INT64) AS an_mid,
    COALESCE(
      SAFE_CAST(SPLIT(COALESCE(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AF_mid=([^;]+)'), ''), ',')[SAFE_OFFSET(alt_offset)] AS FLOAT64),
      SAFE_DIVIDE(SAFE_CAST(SPLIT(COALESCE(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AC_mid=([^;]+)'), ''), ',')[SAFE_OFFSET(alt_offset)] AS INT64), NULLIF(SAFE_CAST(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AN_mid=([^;]+)') AS INT64), 0))
    ) AS af_mid,
    SAFE_CAST(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)nhomalt_mid=([^;]+)') AS INT64) AS hom_mid,
    SAFE_CAST(SPLIT(COALESCE(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AC_afr=([^;]+)'), ''), ',')[SAFE_OFFSET(alt_offset)] AS INT64) AS ac_afr,
    SAFE_CAST(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AN_afr=([^;]+)') AS INT64) AS an_afr,
    COALESCE(
      SAFE_CAST(SPLIT(COALESCE(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AF_afr=([^;]+)'), ''), ',')[SAFE_OFFSET(alt_offset)] AS FLOAT64),
      SAFE_DIVIDE(SAFE_CAST(SPLIT(COALESCE(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AC_afr=([^;]+)'), ''), ',')[SAFE_OFFSET(alt_offset)] AS INT64), NULLIF(SAFE_CAST(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AN_afr=([^;]+)') AS INT64), 0))
    ) AS af_afr,
    SAFE_CAST(SPLIT(COALESCE(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AC_nfe=([^;]+)'), ''), ',')[SAFE_OFFSET(alt_offset)] AS INT64) AS ac_nfe,
    SAFE_CAST(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AN_nfe=([^;]+)') AS INT64) AS an_nfe,
    SAFE_CAST(SPLIT(COALESCE(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AF_nfe=([^;]+)'), ''), ',')[SAFE_OFFSET(alt_offset)] AS FLOAT64) AS af_nfe,
    SAFE_CAST(SPLIT(COALESCE(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AC_fin=([^;]+)'), ''), ',')[SAFE_OFFSET(alt_offset)] AS INT64) AS ac_fin,
    SAFE_CAST(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AN_fin=([^;]+)') AS INT64) AS an_fin,
    SAFE_CAST(SPLIT(COALESCE(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AF_fin=([^;]+)'), ''), ',')[SAFE_OFFSET(alt_offset)] AS FLOAT64) AS af_fin,

    SAFE_CAST(SPLIT(COALESCE(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)AF_asj=([^;]+)'), ''), ',')[SAFE_OFFSET(alt_offset)] AS FLOAT64) AS af_asj,
    SAFE_CAST(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)faf95=([^;]+)') AS FLOAT64) AS grpmax_faf95,
    SAFE_CAST(REGEXP_EXTRACT(info, r'(?:^|;)VarDP=([^;]+)') AS FLOAT64) AS depth
  FROM gnomad_exomes_raw AS raw
  JOIN gene_windows
    ON CONCAT('chr', REGEXP_REPLACE(raw.chrom, r'^chr', '')) = gene_windows.chrom38
   AND raw.pos BETWEEN gene_windows.start_pos38 AND gene_windows.end_pos38
  CROSS JOIN UNNEST(SPLIT(raw.alt, ',')) AS alt_value WITH OFFSET AS alt_offset
  WHERE raw.alt IS NOT NULL
    AND raw.alt != ''
    AND alt_value IS NOT NULL
    AND alt_value != ''
),
gnomad_exomes_agg AS (
  SELECT
    gene_symbol,
    variant_key,
    ANY_VALUE(chrom) AS chrom,
    ANY_VALUE(pos) AS pos,
    ANY_VALUE(ref) AS ref,
    ANY_VALUE(alt) AS alt,
    SUM(ac) AS ac,
    SUM(an) AS an,
    SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(ac), NULLIF(SUM(an), 0)) AS af,
    SUM(hom) AS hom,
    SUM(ac_mid) AS ac_mid,
    SUM(an_mid) AS an_mid,
    SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(ac_mid), NULLIF(SUM(an_mid), 0)) AS af_mid,
    SUM(hom_mid) AS hom_mid,
    SUM(ac_afr) AS ac_afr,
    SUM(an_afr) AS an_afr,
    SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(ac_afr), NULLIF(SUM(an_afr), 0)) AS af_afr,
    SUM(COALESCE(ac_nfe, 0) + COALESCE(ac_fin, 0) + COALESCE(ac_asj, 0)) AS ac_eur_proxy,
    SUM(COALESCE(an_nfe, 0) + COALESCE(an_fin, 0) + COALESCE(an_asj, 0)) AS an_eur_proxy,
    SAFE_DIVIDE(
      SUM(COALESCE(ac_nfe, 0) + COALESCE(ac_fin, 0) + COALESCE(ac_asj, 0)),
      NULLIF(SUM(COALESCE(an_nfe, 0) + COALESCE(an_fin, 0) + COALESCE(an_asj, 0)), 0)
    ) AS af_eur_proxy,
    MAX(grpmax_faf95) AS grpmax_faf95,
    MAX(depth) AS depth
  FROM gnomad_exomes_agg_source_rows
  GROUP BY gene_symbol, variant_key
),
gme_source_rows AS (
  SELECT
    gene_windows.gene_symbol,
    gene_windows.chrom38 AS chrom,
    raw.start AS pos,
    raw.ref AS ref,
    raw.alt AS alt,
    CONCAT(gene_windows.chrom38, ':', CAST(raw.start AS STRING), ':', raw.ref, ':', raw.alt) AS variant_key,
    raw.gme_af,
    raw.gme_nwa,
    raw.gme_nea,
    raw.gme_ap,
    raw.gme_israel,
    raw.gme_sd,
    raw.gme_tp,
    raw.gme_ca
  FROM `genome-services-platform.arab_acmg_raw.gme_hg38_raw` AS raw
  JOIN gene_windows
    ON CONCAT('chr', REGEXP_REPLACE(raw.chrom, r'^chr', '')) = gene_windows.chrom38
   AND raw.start BETWEEN gene_windows.start_pos38 AND gene_windows.end_pos38
),
gme_agg AS (
  SELECT
    gene_symbol,
    variant_key,
    ANY_VALUE(chrom) AS chrom,
    ANY_VALUE(pos) AS pos,
    ANY_VALUE(ref) AS ref,
    ANY_VALUE(alt) AS alt,
    MAX(gme_af) AS gme_af,
    MAX(gme_nwa) AS gme_nwa,
    MAX(gme_nea) AS gme_nea,
    MAX(gme_ap) AS gme_ap,
    MAX(gme_israel) AS gme_israel,
    MAX(gme_sd) AS gme_sd,
    MAX(gme_tp) AS gme_tp,
    MAX(gme_ca) AS gme_ca
  FROM gme_source_rows
  GROUP BY gene_symbol, variant_key
),
all_keys AS (
  SELECT gene_symbol, variant_key, chrom, pos, ref, alt FROM clinvar_agg
  UNION DISTINCT
  SELECT gene_symbol, variant_key, chrom, pos, ref, alt FROM gnomad_genomes_agg
  UNION DISTINCT
  SELECT gene_symbol, variant_key, chrom, pos, ref, alt FROM gnomad_exomes_agg
  UNION DISTINCT
  SELECT gene_symbol, variant_key, chrom, pos, ref, alt FROM gme_agg
)
        SELECT
  all_keys.chrom AS `CHROM`,
  all_keys.pos AS `POS`,
  all_keys.pos + LENGTH(all_keys.ref) - 1 AS `END`,
  all_keys.variant_key AS `ID`,
  all_keys.ref AS `REF`,
  all_keys.alt AS `ALT`,
  CASE
  WHEN LENGTH(all_keys.ref) = 1 AND LENGTH(all_keys.alt) = 1 THEN 'SNV'
  WHEN LENGTH(all_keys.ref) = LENGTH(all_keys.alt) AND LENGTH(all_keys.ref) > 1 THEN 'MNV'
  WHEN LENGTH(all_keys.ref) < LENGTH(all_keys.alt) THEN 'INS'
  WHEN LENGTH(all_keys.ref) > LENGTH(all_keys.alt) THEN 'DEL'
  ELSE 'COMPLEX'
END AS `VARTYPE`,
  CAST(NULL AS STRING) AS `Repeat`,
  CAST(NULL AS STRING) AS `Segdup`,
  CAST(NULL AS STRING) AS `Blacklist`,
  all_keys.gene_symbol AS `GENE`,
  clinvar.effect AS `EFFECT`,
  CAST(NULL AS STRING) AS `HGVS_C`,
  CAST(NULL AS STRING) AS `HGVS_P`,
  CAST(NULL AS STRING) AS `PHENOTYPES_OMIM`,
  CAST(NULL AS STRING) AS `PHENOTYPES_OMIM_ID`,
  CAST(NULL AS STRING) AS `INHERITANCE_PATTERN`,
  clinvar.alleleid AS `ALLELEID`,
  clinvar.clnsig AS `CLNSIG`,
  CAST(NULL AS FLOAT64) AS `TOPMED_AF`,
  CAST(NULL AS INT64) AS `TOPMed_Hom`,
  CAST(NULL AS FLOAT64) AS `ALFA_AF`,
  CAST(NULL AS INT64) AS `ALFA_Hom`,
  SAFE_DIVIDE(COALESCE(gnomad_genomes.ac, 0) + COALESCE(gnomad_exomes.ac, 0), NULLIF(COALESCE(gnomad_genomes.an, 0) + COALESCE(gnomad_exomes.an, 0), 0)) AS `GNOMAD_ALL_AF`,
  CASE
    WHEN gnomad_genomes.hom IS NULL AND gnomad_exomes.hom IS NULL THEN NULL
    ELSE COALESCE(gnomad_genomes.hom, 0) + COALESCE(gnomad_exomes.hom, 0)
  END AS `gnomAD_all_Hom`,
  SAFE_DIVIDE(COALESCE(gnomad_genomes.ac_mid, 0) + COALESCE(gnomad_exomes.ac_mid, 0), NULLIF(COALESCE(gnomad_genomes.an_mid, 0) + COALESCE(gnomad_exomes.an_mid, 0), 0)) AS `GNOMAD_MID_AF`,
  CASE
    WHEN gnomad_genomes.hom_mid IS NULL AND gnomad_exomes.hom_mid IS NULL THEN NULL
    ELSE COALESCE(gnomad_genomes.hom_mid, 0) + COALESCE(gnomad_exomes.hom_mid, 0)
  END AS `gnomAD_mid_Hom`,
  CAST(NULL AS FLOAT64) AS `ONEKGP_AF`,
  CAST(NULL AS FLOAT64) AS `REGENERON_AF`,
  CAST(NULL AS FLOAT64) AS `TGP_AF`,
  CAST(NULL AS FLOAT64) AS `QATARI`,
  CAST(NULL AS FLOAT64) AS `JGP_AF`,
  CAST(NULL AS FLOAT64) AS `JGP_MAF`,
  CAST(NULL AS INT64) AS `JGP_Hom`,
  CAST(NULL AS INT64) AS `JGP_Het`,
  CAST(NULL AS INT64) AS `JGP_AC_Hemi`,
  CAST(NULL AS STRING) AS `SIFT_PRED`,
  CAST(NULL AS STRING) AS `POLYPHEN2_HDIV_PRED`,
  CAST(NULL AS STRING) AS `POLYPHEN2_HVAR_PRED`,
  CAST(NULL AS STRING) AS `PROVEAN_PRE`,
  clinvar.clnrevstat AS `CLNREVSTAT`,
  gnomad_genomes.ac AS `GNOMAD_GENOMES_AC`,
  gnomad_genomes.an AS `GNOMAD_GENOMES_AN`,
  gnomad_genomes.af AS `GNOMAD_GENOMES_AF`,
  gnomad_genomes.hom AS `GNOMAD_GENOMES_HOM`,
  gnomad_genomes.af_afr AS `GNOMAD_GENOMES_AF_AFR`,
  gnomad_genomes.af_eur_proxy AS `GNOMAD_GENOMES_AF_EUR_PROXY`,
  gnomad_exomes.ac AS `GNOMAD_EXOMES_AC`,
  gnomad_exomes.an AS `GNOMAD_EXOMES_AN`,
  gnomad_exomes.af AS `GNOMAD_EXOMES_AF`,
  gnomad_exomes.hom AS `GNOMAD_EXOMES_HOM`,
  gnomad_exomes.af_afr AS `GNOMAD_EXOMES_AF_AFR`,
  gnomad_exomes.af_eur_proxy AS `GNOMAD_EXOMES_AF_EUR_PROXY`,
  gnomad_genomes.depth AS `GNOMAD_GENOMES_DEPTH`,
  gnomad_exomes.depth AS `GNOMAD_EXOMES_DEPTH`,
  IF(clinvar.variant_key IS NOT NULL, 1, 0)
    + IF(gnomad_genomes.variant_key IS NOT NULL, 1, 0)
    + IF(gnomad_exomes.variant_key IS NOT NULL, 1, 0) AS `SOURCE_COUNT`,
  'FINAL_WITH_GME' AS `PIPELINE_STAGE`,
  gme.gme_af AS `GME_AF`,
  gme.gme_nwa AS `GME_NWA`,
  gme.gme_nea AS `GME_NEA`,
  gme.gme_ap AS `GME_AP`,
  gme.gme_israel AS `GME_ISRAEL`,
  gme.gme_sd AS `GME_SD`,
  gme.gme_tp AS `GME_TP`,
  gme.gme_ca AS `GME_CA`
FROM all_keys
LEFT JOIN clinvar_agg AS clinvar USING (gene_symbol, variant_key)
LEFT JOIN gnomad_genomes_agg AS gnomad_genomes USING (gene_symbol, variant_key)
LEFT JOIN gnomad_exomes_agg AS gnomad_exomes USING (gene_symbol, variant_key)
LEFT JOIN gme_agg AS gme USING (gene_symbol, variant_key)
        ORDER BY `GENE`, `CHROM`, `POS`, `REF`, `ALT`

arab_pre_gme.scope_note: Arab-aware checkpoint from normalized ClinVar + gnomAD + SHGP before GME is added.
accuracy_notes: The required publication-facing header remains the minimum schema and unsupported fields stay NULL.
Combined gnomAD fields are calculated from explicit genomes/exomes counts carried alongside the final row.
SHGP is now part of the pre-GME checkpoint because it is a primary Arab frequency source, not an afterthought.
scientific_notes: This table is built from frozen normalized Parquet artifacts only; there is no live BigQuery rebuild behind the UI.
Every row inherits the canonical variant key from the normalized source artifacts, and each source can still be reviewed independently on the Harmonization page.

arab_registry.build_sql: Build logic is executed in scripts/build_brca_normalized_artifacts.py. The final checkpoint starts from the frozen Arab pre-GME checkpoint and left-joins normalized GME BRCA rows by canonical variant key.

sample.query_sql: Frozen artifact preview from the approved BRCA normalization bundle; no live analytical query is executed at review time.

groups.title: Stage 1 outputs: raw source freezes
groups.summary: Exact upstream source packages stored in GCS before any liftover, filtering, or BRCA normalization.

entries.title: ClinVar raw BRCA-window preview
entries.overview: Untouched ClinVar evidence constrained to the BRCA windows before normalization-derived checkpoint aggregation.
references: Preview rows are sourced from the untouched ClinVar BRCA-window extraction before chromosome renaming or allele normalization.
entries.download_note: Displayed rows are the frozen BRCA-window preview. The file list below is the full frozen source package used to build that preview.

entries.title: gnomAD genomes raw BRCA-window preview
entries.overview: Untouched gnomAD genomes evidence constrained to the BRCA windows before checkpoint aggregation.
references: The source remains logically split across chr13 and chr17, but the preview is unified for review.
entries.download_note: Displayed rows are the frozen BRCA-window preview. The file list below is the full frozen source package used to build that preview.

entries.title: gnomAD exomes raw BRCA-window preview
entries.overview: Untouched gnomAD exomes evidence constrained to the BRCA windows before checkpoint aggregation.
references: The source remains logically split across chr13 and chr17, but the preview is unified for review.
entries.download_note: Displayed rows are the frozen BRCA-window preview. The file list below is the full frozen source package used to build that preview.

entries.title: SHGP raw BRCA-window preview
entries.overview: Untouched SHGP rows inside the BRCA windows before table-to-VCF conversion.
references: This is the first primary Arab frequency source now carried into the checkpoint workflow.
entries.download_note: Displayed rows are the frozen BRCA-window preview. The file list below is the full frozen source package used to build that preview.

entries.title: GME raw BRCA-window preview
entries.overview: Untouched GME rows inside the BRCA windows before table-to-VCF conversion.
references: GME remains a supporting source and is added only after the Arab pre-GME checkpoint is already reviewable.
entries.download_note: Displayed rows are the frozen BRCA-window preview. The file list below is the full frozen source package used to build that preview.

groups.title: Stage 2 outputs: build conversion evidence
groups.summary: Files produced only for sources that needed explicit GRCh37 to GRCh38 handling.

entries.title: AVDB UAE build-conversion package
entries.overview: Raw AVDB workbook plus the frozen liftover parquet/report that document the GRCh37 to GRCh38 conversion.
references: Reference-only source: valid build conversion, but no BRCA rows in the frozen release.

groups.title: Stage 3 outputs: BRCA-normalized source artifacts

references: This table stays frozen exactly as the historical baseline checkpoint.

entries.overview: Historical final BRCA checkpoint frozen before adding the new Arab frequency datasets.
references: Use this frozen final table as the baseline comparison point.

groups.title: Stage 6 outputs: Arab extension tables
